steps.assistant_text: Param-reuse cursors: inner cursors ARE the parameters (a0=drow; a1=srow; *a0=*a1; a0++; a1++) — their webs re-take the a0/a1 home registers, unreachable by named locals. + hoisted dead int j=0 at top scope rotates the web-coloring 3-cycle into target (uopt colors webs in first-def order).

metadata.verification: objdiff fuzzy=100.0 + make verify ROM byte-identical
